description: An analyst needs to compare website traffic for the last quarter to the same quarter in the previous year.

nodes.task_description: In the analytics tool, select the date range for the last quarter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sets the correct date range.

nodes.task_description: Use the 'compare to' feature to select the same date range from the previous year.

expected_outcome.value: The tool is now configured to show a year-over-year comparison.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the results to determine the percentage change in key metrics like users, sessions, and conversion rate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a summary of the year-over-year growth or decline.
